page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7se.8xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, requiring external network storage solutions. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

The processor features a 48 MB L3 cache, 1 MB L2 cache, and 48 KB L1d cache. It supports advanced instruction sets including AVX, AVX-512F, AVX-512_VNNI, AES, VAES, and SHA_NI, which accelerate cryptographic and vector-based operations. In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates average performance across most CPU and memory tasks, with a Passmark CPU score of 36838.07 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 13470.0. Notably, it exhibits strong performance in multi-threaded Bzip3 decompression, reaching 161.37 GB/sec, and in Passmark memory testing, scoring 2789.6.

For specialized workloads, the ecs.c7se.8xlarge delivers strong text generation speeds of 316.66 tokens/sec during LLM inference with a small 135M parameter model, while maintaining average speeds of 19.1 tokens/sec on a medium 7B model. The instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local NVMe storage, offering a high density of dedicated Intel Xeon cores. It is well-suited for multi-threaded decompression, software compilation, web serving, and moderate-scale machine learning inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7se.8xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz on the KVM hypervisor. This x86_64 instance features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM, representing a 2.0 GB per core ratio. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage, and provides a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks indicate average capabilities across standard CPU and memory tasks, with notable strengths in multi-threaded Bzip3 decompression and memory performance. The processor supports AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration flags. This instance is designed for compute-intensive workloads such as software compilation, web serving, and small-to-medium scale machine learning inference where dedicated CPU resources are required without the overhead of local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7se.8xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64.0 GB of RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for compute-intensive workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core Intel Xeon compute-optimized instance designed for multi-threaded processing, software compilation, and network-dependent workloads without local storage.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.9 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no bundled local storage
Strong multi-threaded Bzip3 decompression and memory benchmark performance
Supports AVX-512 and cryptographic hardware acceleration
Suited for software compilation, web serving, and moderate LLM inference
